title: Sickened PowerCraft Mobs
description: Scary Addon/ Element Survival Mod; Sickened PowerCraft Mob Entities Addon for Cracker's  Wither Storm Mod
body:
Need more Sickened Mobs, Are they easy for you? You got it, This mod is the right pick for you! The Sickened PowerCraft Mobs is an addon for both Electro's PowerCraft and Cracker's Wither Storm Mod! Adding new Sickened affected PowerCraft Entities to the game, Adding more variations and making it tougher to fight!

NOTE: This mod requries both Electro's PowerCraft and Cracker's Wither Storm Mod in order for this mod to work properly!

Version Range:

Electro's PowerCraft: 1.4.11.7.1535+

Cracker's Wither Storm Mod 4.0+

- New Sickened Mobs!
